intro: Barosma betulina, also known as Buchu, is a plant native to South Africa that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The powder extracted from its leaves is commonly used as a natural remedy to alleviate urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder infections. Barosma betulina powder is also prized for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in natural health supplements and herbal remedies.

recipe: To make barosma betulina powder for medicinal use, first, dry the roots of the Barosma betulina plant thoroughly, either by air-drying or using a food dehydrator.
